opener: The arena is quiet today, the air heavy with expectation.
closer: A professional display by the arena's finest.

opener: They want blood, and the arena delivers!
closer: No mercy was found today in the circle of truth.

opener: A drama unfolds on the sands today!
closer: A performance for the ages, etched in the memories of all who watched.

opener: A heavy silence hangs over the arena walls.
closer: The games continue, though the air remains thick with memory.

opener: Music and laughter fill the air as the festive games begin!
closer: A day of celebration ends with hearts full and wine flowing.

high.text: Summons a storm of steel that leaves no room to breathe
A terrifying maestro of battle tempo, dictating every bloody exchange
Bends the chaos of the pit to his will, forcing foes to fight on his terms
Drowns his opponent in a relentless tide of crushing aggression
Forces a suffocating, lethal rhythm onto the blood-soaked sands
Steals the center of the pit and refuses to yield a single step
Has learned how to keep his foe in trouble

low.text: Lunges from the shadows before the opponent is ready
Fights with a hungry, restless aggression
With a very aggressive and clever fighting style
Has learned how to be decisive and quick

high.text: Baits their opponent into a fatal trap of their own making
Turns the opponent's strength into their execution
Makes the most of his enemy's mistakes
Makes good dueling decisions

low.text: Twists an enemy's assault into a sudden, bloody end
Does a lot of little things well
Cleverly controls his foe's actions

high.text: Obliterates opponents with god-like, merciless precision
Hunts for the vital organs with terrifying precision
Makes very clever attacks
He lands blows on less protected areas

low.text: Transforms every meager opening into a harrowing bloodbath
Has an unusual fighting style that confuses many opponents
Makes clever attacks

high.text: An impenetrable wall of iron, turning aside the deadliest steel
Parrys very intelligently
Is gifted at parrying

low.text: Denies the killing stroke with grim, practiced resolve
Rarely makes mistakes
Parrys intelligently

high.text: Displays a chilling level of situational dominance
Is always thinking ahead
Is gifted at avoiding a blow

low.text: Weaves through the carnage with grim efficiency
Avoids blows well
Makes few mistakes

high.text: A tireless engine of destruction, grinding foes to bloody paste
Rarely wastes his endurance needlessly
Can conserve his endurance past what might normally be expected

low.text: Refuses to empty his lungs until the slaughter is completely finished
He plans out every move he makes, seldom wasting any effort
Seldom wastes his endurance needlessly

high.text: Surrenders the momentum to the butcher immediately, standing completely helpless
He needs time to think things through before he can act

low.text: Moves with the urgency of a stone sinking in mud
He stands around slack-jawed

high.text: Telegraphs every swing so heavily it practically invites his own death
He makes a lot of mistakes

low.text: Telegraphs every swing like a lumbering ox
He makes stupid feints that fool no one

coordination.Marvel of Fighting Coordination: Is a marvel of fighting coordination

generic: leaves a sickening, pulsing wound on {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}
impacts with the sickening sound of snapping bone on {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}
carves a spray of crimson from {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}

glancing: {{attacker}} slashes with his {{weapon}}, but the strike is a glancing blow only.
solid: {{attacker}} unleashes a blinding flurry of cuts with his {{weapon}}, biting into the {{bodyPart}}!
{{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} lunges with awesome cutting power, rending the {{bodyPart}}!
{{attacker}} lunges with sudden ferocity, leaving a bloody trail across {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}!
mastery: In a blur of practiced rhythm, {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} flows through {{defender}}'s guard to find the {{bodyPart}}.
The {{weapon}} moves like an extension of {{attacker}}'s own soul, carving a perfect line across the {{bodyPart}}.
critical_human: A horrifying display of speed as {{attacker}} carves a deep path through {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} with his {{weapon}}!
{{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} flashes as he takes a sudden vicious slash, nearly severing the {{bodyPart}}!
critical_supernatural: The air shudders as {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} hums with a spectral light, cleaving through {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} and the very air itself.
Aetheric pressure precedes the blow; {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} strikes with the weight of stars, obliterating the {{bodyPart}}.
fatal: {{attacker}} feints low, catching {{defender}} off guard before severing their {{bodyPart}} at the joint.
A fountain of gore erupts as {{attacker}}'s final strike decapitates {{defender}}!
With a sickening crunch, {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} cleaves through {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}, ending their life in an instant.
{{attacker}} spins with terrible grace, their {{weapon}} severing {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}. The crowd screams as {{defender}} falls lifeless.
A masterful stroke! {{attacker}} brings the {{weapon}} down with executioner's finality upon {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}.
{{attacker}} feints high, then sweeps the {{weapon}} low, completely butchering {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} in a fatal arc.
{{attacker}} feints low, catching {{defender}} off guard before severing their {{bodyPart}} with a clinical strike. The crowd erupts!
A horrific spray of crimson follows as {{attacker}}'s blade effortlessly cleaves through {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}.
{{attacker}} sidesteps a desperate lunge, bringing the {{weapon}} down in a monstrous arc that takes {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} clean off.
{{defender}} screams in agony as {{attacker}} butchers their {{bodyPart}}, leaving a gruesome testament to {{attacker}}'s prowess.
critical: {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} becomes a blur of silver, opening a horrific gash on {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}!
A masterful, sweeping cut from {{attacker}} bites deep into bone!
Blood flows like a river as {{attacker}}'s slash finds its mark on {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}!
{{attacker}} executes a perfect draw-cut, leaving a devastating wound!
With unnatural speed, {{attacker}}'s blade carves through {{defender}}'s defenses and flesh alike!

glancing: {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} bounces off the {{bodyPart}} with a hollow clang.
solid: {{attacker}} roars, bringing the {{weapon}} down like an executioner's maul on the {{bodyPart}}!
mastery: {{attacker}} catches {{defender}} in a perfect orbit of weight, hammering the {{bodyPart}} with crushing precision.
critical_human: The arena trembles as {{attacker}} unleashes a terrifying overhead smash, crushing the {{bodyPart}}!
critical_supernatural: Gravity itself seems to bow to {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}}, creating a localized shockwave on the {{bodyPart}}.
fatal: {{attacker}} delivers a horrifying, skull-crushing execution!
The heavy thud of {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} against {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} signals a brutal end to the bout.
{{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} caves in with a wet crunch as {{attacker}} brings the {{weapon}} crashing down. It is over.
There is no getting up from that. {{attacker}} shatters {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} completely with a horrific smash.
{{attacker}} winds up and unleashes hell, the {{weapon}} obliterating {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} and their life with it.
The horrifying crunch of bone echoes through the arena as {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} utterly demolishes {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}.
{{attacker}} heaves the {{weapon}} overhead and brings it down like a falling mountain, smashing {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} into pulp.
With terrifying momentum, {{attacker}} sweeps the {{weapon}} into {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}, delivering a crushing blow that ends the fight instantly.
There is nothing but ruin left of {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} after {{attacker}} connects with a sickening, wet thud.

glancing: {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} skips off the {{bodyPart}}, barely scratching the surface.
solid: {{attacker}} drops his center and drives a blinding lunge with his {{weapon}} into the {{bodyPart}}!
mastery: {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} finds the microscopic gap in {{defender}}'s defense, sliding effortlessly into the {{bodyPart}}.
critical_human: {{attacker}} extends fully, every ounce of reach behind his {{weapon}} as it sinks deep into the {{bodyPart}}!
critical_supernatural: The {{weapon}} hums a low, deathly note, bypassing reality to hit the {{bodyPart}} with cold light.
fatal: {{attacker}} executes {{defender}} with a chilling lunge of the {{weapon}} through the {{bodyPart}}!
{{attacker}} finds the perfect angle, burying the {{weapon}} to the hilt in {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}. A clean kill.
A blinding thrust! {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} pierces directly through {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}, pinning them to their fate.
{{defender}} gasps as {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} slides into their {{bodyPart}}, the lethal point emerging from the other side.
With snake-like speed, {{attacker}} drives the {{weapon}} deep into {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}. The light leaves {{defender}}'s eyes.
{{attacker}} lunges forward, sinking the {{weapon}} so deeply into {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} that it requires leverage to pull it free.
A masterful thrust from {{attacker}} finds the seam in armor, skewering {{defender}} through the {{bodyPart}} and anchoring them to the sand.
{{defender}}'s eyes widen in disbelief as they look down at {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} protruding from their {{bodyPart}}.
With surgical precision, {{attacker}} drives the {{weapon}} through {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}, severing the vital arteries.

glancing: {{attacker}} throws a PUNCH, but it merely grazes {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}.
solid: {{attacker}} steps inside the guard and unleashes a horrific combination on the {{bodyPart}}!
mastery: {{attacker}}'s limbs are a blur of technical perfection, striking the {{bodyPart}} with rhythmic violence.
critical_human: {{attacker}} throws a rock-fisted PUNCH of incredible felling power into the {{bodyPart}}!
critical_supernatural: A golden light follows {{attacker}}'s strike, shattering the air as the {{bodyPart}} is struck by 'The Enlightened Hand'.
fatal: {{attacker}} grabs his opponent and drives a sickening KNEE into their midsection. {{defender}} collapses dead.
{{attacker}} grabs {{defender}}'s head and snaps their neck in one terrifying, fluid motion.
A devastating haymaker from {{attacker}} catches {{defender}} flush on the {{bodyPart}}, breaking bone and stopping their heart.
{{attacker}} pummels {{defender}} into the sand with merciless fury, the final strike to the {{bodyPart}} sealing their doom.
In a terrifying display of raw power, {{attacker}} crushes {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} with a bare-handed execution.
{{attacker}} leaps forward, delivering a brutal flying strike that pulverizes {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} and ends their life.
A sickening snap resounds as {{attacker}} twists {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} into an unnatural angle, securing a lethal finish.
{{attacker}} rains a flurry of merciless blows upon {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}, battering them completely to death.
With an explosive surge of strength, {{attacker}} drives their fist into {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}, delivering a final, lethal strike.

openers: The stench of old blood rises as the fighters step onto the sand.
The crowd bays for blood as the combatants lock eyes.
Steel is drawn, and the roar of the coliseum becomes deafening!
A hush falls. Then the ARENAMASTER drops his hand, and steel is drawn.
The arena gates screech open, and the warriors step forth into the unforgiving light.
Sand crunching underfoot, the combatants measure each other before the first blow falls.
The crowd's chanting swells to a roar as weapons are unsheathed and readied.
Blood-stained sand awaits fresh tribute as the ARENAMASTER signals the start.
whiffs: {{attacker}} swings his {{weapon}} but finds only air.
{{attacker}} wildly misses the mark with their {{weapon}}.
A desperate swing from {{attacker}} finds nothing but the arena sand.
{{defender}} leans back just in time to watch {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} carve empty air.
With an elegant pivot, {{defender}} makes {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} look clumsy.
{{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} cuts only the wind as {{defender}} gracefully evades.
{{defender}} weaves out of the path of {{attacker}}'s predictable {{weapon}} swing.
A wild strike from {{attacker}} misses by miles.
{{attacker}} telegraphs the strike, allowing {{defender}} an easy sidestep.
{{defender}} misdirects {{attacker}}, causing the {{weapon}} to slam uselessly into the dirt.

glancing: The attack is a glancing blow only.
fatal: {{attacker}} executes a merciless coup de grâce, ending {{defender}}'s misery.
The crowd falls dead silent as {{attacker}}'s strike abruptly ends {{defender}}'s life.
With an explosive burst of violence, {{attacker}} extinguishes the light from {{defender}}'s eyes.
A brutal, uncompromising blow by {{attacker}} shatters {{defender}} completely.
{{attacker}} roars in triumph over the broken, lifeless form of {{defender}}.
Blood sprays across the sands as {{attacker}} delivers the final, fatal judgment.
{{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} claims another soul for the void today.
The arena echoes with the sickening sound of {{defender}}'s life being crushed out by {{attacker}}.
There is no recovery from that—{{attacker}} has sent {{defender}} to the ancestors.
{{attacker}} stands victorious, {{defender}} dead before they even hit the ground.

success: {{defender}} twists his body with prideful grace, allowing the attack to pass harmlessly by.
{{defender}} catches the strike on the edge of his {{weapon}}, turning it aside with ease.
{{defender}} meets the {{weapon}} with a resounding clash of steel!
Sparks fly as {{defender}} cleanly deflects {{attacker}}'s powerful swing.
{{defender}} holds their ground, knocking the incoming {{weapon}} aside.
With an expert twist of the wrist, {{defender}} parries the strike harmlessly away.
The crowd cheers as {{defender}} demonstrates perfect defensive form.
{{defender}} catches the blow on his SHIELD.

stalemate: The fighters slowly circle each other, looking for a weakness.
trading_blows: The two warriors fiercely trade attacks and parry.
pressing: {{attacker}} presses the attack relentlessly, giving his foe no room to breathe!

negative: Boos and jeers echo from the arena walls.
encourage: The crowd urges the warriors on.
gasp: The crowd gasps at the shocking display!
A collective intake of breath from the stands!
The audience recoils from the sheer violence!
A sudden hush falls over the arena.
The spectators clutch their pearls in horror!
cheer: The crowd erupts into deafening cheers!
A roar of bloodlust rises from the stands!
The spectators are on their feet, demanding more blood!
boo: Jeers and boos rain down from the cheap seats.
The crowd hurls insults, displeased with the display.
A chorus of groans sweeps the arena.
The audience demands a better show!
Fruit is thrown from the stands in disgust.

winner: {{attacker}} roars, 'Who else wants to die today?!'
loser: {{attacker}} spits blood and refuses to look away.

initiative: With a sudden burst of speed, {{attacker}} seizes the opening!
{{attacker}} dictating the pace of the exchange.
feints: {{attacker}} feints a high line, drawing {{defender}} out of position.

ST: His parry shatters under your monstrous strength!
SP: He moves with blinding speed, leaving you swinging at shadows.
DF: He clumsily overextends, leaving himself wide open.
WL: Despite the punishment, his iron will keeps him standing.

Kill: The life fades from {{defender}}'s eyes as {{attacker}} stands victorious.
The arena falls utterly silent for a heartbeat, before erupting at the brutal execution delivered by {{attacker}}.
{{attacker}} stands triumphant over the remains of {{defender}}, as blood soaks the thirsty sands.
In a terrifying display of lethal intent, {{attacker}} reduces {{defender}} to a mere memory.
{{attacker}} roars a challenge to the heavens, having just claimed another soul in the Blood Sands.
conclusions.KO: {{defender}} collapses into the sand, unconscious. {{attacker}} is the victor.
conclusions.Stoppage: The match is called. {{defender}} cannot continue. {{attacker}} wins!
conclusions.Exhaustion: Both warriors are spent, but {{attacker}} is awarded the victory.

grim: %D fell to %A%H. The sands drink deep.

KO: What a knockout! The crowd erupts!
{{attacker}} lays out {{defender}} with a devastating blow!
Kill: The life leaves {{defender}}'s eyes. What a savage display!
Flashy: What a flashy display of skill!
Upset: The upset of the week! {{defender}} never saw it coming!
What a shock! {{attacker}} defies the odds!

tavern_brawl.title: Tavern Brawl!
newsletter: {{name}} got into a wild tavern brawl last night! They gained +{{fame}} Fame but suffered a minor injury.

celestial_blessing.title: A Sign from the Gods!
newsletter: A shooting star was seen over the arena exactly as {{name}} was training. (+{{fame}} Fame, +{{xp}} XP)

lost_relic.title: Lost Relic Discovery
newsletter: {{name}} discovered an ancient artifact while exploring the ruins! (+{{fame}} Fame, +{{xp}} XP)

Kill: In a {{adj}} display, {{winner}} struck down {{loser}} with a killing blow.
With a {{adj}} final strike, {{winner}} executed {{loser}} without mercy.
The crowd gasped as {{winner}} ended {{loser}}'s life in a {{adj}} climax.
{{loser}}'s blood stained the sands after a {{adj}} killing blow from {{winner}}.
{{winner}} painted the sands red, butchering {{loser}} in a truly {{adj}} spectacle.
No quarter was asked and none given, as {{winner}} systematically dismantled {{loser}} before a {{adj}} execution.
The crowd roared their approval when {{winner}} claimed {{loser}}'s life in a {{adj}} climax of violence.
A grisly end for {{loser}}, who fell victim to {{winner}}'s {{adj}} and inescapable wrath.
{{winner}} delivered a masterclass in brutality, ending {{loser}} with a {{adj}} and decisive blow.
KO: {{winner}} delivered a {{adj}} blow that sent {{loser}} spiraling into darkness.
A {{adj}} masterclass from {{winner}} left {{loser}} twitching on the sand.
{{loser}}'s legs gave out after a {{adj}} assault by {{winner}}.
A deafening crack rang out as {{winner}} dropped {{loser}} with a {{adj}} final blow.
{{loser}} crumbled like a puppet with cut strings after enduring {{winner}}'s {{adj}} assault.
{{winner}} put {{loser}} to sleep, much to the crowd's {{adj}} delight.
In a shocking turn, {{winner}} found the perfect angle to knock {{loser}} senseless in a {{adj}} finish.
{{loser}} will wake up with a hell of a headache, thanks to {{winner}}'s {{adj}} right hand.
Stoppage: {{winner}} ground {{loser}} down. The Arenamaster called the stoppage.
The sheer {{adj}} pressure from {{winner}} forced the officials to save {{loser}}'s life.
Mercy was shown to {{loser}}, as the Arenamaster halted {{winner}}'s {{adj}} onslaught.
{{winner}} broke {{loser}}'s spirit with a {{adj}} display, prompting an early end.
The Arenamaster interceded to save {{loser}} from {{winner}}'s {{adj}} and unrelenting fury.
A merciful stoppage spared {{loser}} further humiliation against the {{adj}} might of {{winner}}.
{{winner}} battered {{loser}} into submission, forcing a {{adj}} end to the bout.
The white towel flew for {{loser}}, yielding the sands to {{winner}} in a {{adj}} display.
{{winner}} showed {{adj}} dominance, leaving the officials no choice but to call it.
Exhaustion: Both fighters pushed to total exhaustion. {{winner}} was awarded the bout.
In a grueling test of wills, {{winner}} outlasted a completely spent {{loser}}.
Lungs burning and muscles failing, {{winner}} barely edged out {{loser}} at the limit.
A battle of attrition ended with {{loser}} unable to stand, handing {{winner}} the victory.
Draw: The sands of time ran out before a victor could be declared.
Neither warrior could claim the edge; a brutal stalemate was the only result.
The bell saved them both from mutual destruction in an epic clash.
Default: A hard-fought struggle between {{a}} and {{d}} ended in {{winner}}'s favor.
{{winner}} emerged triumphant over {{loser}} in a hard-fought contest.
A grueling test between {{a}} and {{d}} saw {{winner}} raise their arms in victory.

The Halls of the Dead Welcome {{count}} New Soul{{plural}}.
A Moment of Silence for the {{count}} Warrior{{plural}} Lost This Week.

LegendaryStreak: Whispers of the ancients surround {{name}}, whose {{streak}} victories have become legend.
Few live to see such glory. {{name}} has achieved the impossible with {{streak}} straight wins.
Bards will sing of {{name}} for generations. A {{streak}}-win streak cements their immortal legacy.
HotStreak: {{name}} is unstoppable, carving a path through the rankings with {{streak}} wins.
The crowd's favorite, {{name}}, leaves another broken body in the dust for win number {{streak}}.
It seems no one can find a weakness in {{name}}'s armor. {{streak}} wins and counting.
Streak: The momentum stays with {{name}} as they secure their {{streak}}th win.
A solid foundation is being built by {{name}} with their {{streak}}th win.
Slowly but surely, {{name}} climbs the ranks. {{streak}} wins show great promise.
LegacyRivalry: The grand history between {{a}} and {{b}} continues. This was their {{count}}{{suffix}} meeting.
We thought we had seen it all, but the {{count}}{{suffix}} bout between {{a}} and {{b}} was a masterpiece of violence.
The hatred between {{a}} and {{b}} transcends the sport. Chapter {{count}} did not disappoint.
Rivalry: The bad blood between {{a}} and {{b}} was on full display today.
Sparks flew as {{a}} and {{b}} collided in a highly anticipated grudge match.
There is no love lost between {{a}} and {{b}}. The tension in the arena was palpable.
RisingStar: All eyes are on {{name}}, a rising star who refuses to taste defeat.
The veterans are watching their backs. {{name}} looks to be the real deal.
Flawless execution. {{name}} is proving to be a dangerous new addition to the roster.
Upset: Nobody saw it coming! {{winner}} (fame: {{fameW}}) shattered the ego of the celebrated {{loser}} (fame: {{fameL}}).
A humbling moment for {{loser}} (fame: {{fameL}}) as they fall to the much lesser-known {{winner}} (fame: {{fameW}}).
Graveyard: We mourn the {{count}} warrior{{plural}} who gave everything to the sands this week.
The sands drink deeply today. We remember the {{count}} soul{{plural}} claimed by the arena.
Not all who enter the pit leave it. {{count}} fighter{{plural}} paid the ultimate price.

season_summary.headline: {{season}} Season in Review: {{total}} Bouts, {{kills}} Deaths
body: The {{season}} season concludes with {{total}} bouts fought and a {{killRate}}% fatality rate.
It was a particularly deadly season — many promising careers cut short.
The arena turns its gaze to the next season. What legends will emerge?

fanfare.gazette_empty: A quiet week in the arena. No major headlines.
fanfare.report_combat_empty: Your stable did not participate in any official bouts this week.

tributes: A legend has passed into the halls of iron.
The arena grows colder with the loss of {{name}}.

origin: Found fighting for scraps in the pit districts.

flair.Flashy: Crowd favorite — earns +2 Popularity per flashy fight.

title.Champion: Arena title holder. Earns passive fame each week.

injury.Broken Arm: Reduces Attack and Parry effectiveness until healed.

AimedBlow: {{attacker}} studies the opponent's rhythm, waiting for the perfect opening.
BashingAttack: {{attacker}} hammers through the defensive stance — raw power overwhelms technique!
